applied_optimizations.name: torch.compile with inductor tuning
applied_optimizations.description: Applied torch.compile(mode='default') with coordinate_descent_tuning and max_autotune enabled. Also set environment variables GPU_MAX_HW_QUEUES=2, PYTORCH_TUNABLEOP_ENABLED=1, TORCH_BLAS_PREFER_HIPBLASLT=1, and torch.set_float32_matmul_precision('high')

attempted_but_failed.name: Manual Triton fused kernel (vectorized)
attempted_but_failed.reason: Correct but too slow - sequential loop over 14,415 spatial positions caused 4x slowdown

attempted_but_failed.name: Manual Triton fused kernel (blocked)
attempted_but_failed.reason: Correctness issues - kernel produced incorrect output values

notes: Main bottlenecks are ConvTranspose3d GEMM (28.5%) and memory transpose operations (35.4%)
Elementwise ops (scale, maxpool, clamp) account for ~22% and could potentially be fused
Manual Triton kernel with sequential loop was correct but 4x slower due to loop overhead
Triton blocked kernel had correctness issues that couldn't be resolved

attempted_but_failed.name: trial_4
attempted_but_failed.reason: Three consecutive no-output trials (2, 3, 4). With 26 min left, giving one final attempt with exact copy-paste code. If this fails, pipeline should stop.

attempted_but_failed.name: trial_5
attempted_but_failed.reason: Five consecutive trials (2-5) produced no output. The agent consistently fails when attempting optimization beyond the torch.compile baseline. With only ~25 minutes remaining and 4 straight no-output
